CREATE TABLE devices (device_id UInt32, last_active DateTime);
SELECT device_id, toStartOfFiveMinutes(last_active) FROM devices ORDER BY last_active;
SELECT event_time, toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM events WHERE event_time >= toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:15:00');
SELECT d.device_id, e.event_time, toStartOfFiveMinutes(e.event_time) AS rounded_time FROM devices d JOIN events e ON d.last_active = e.event_time;
SELECT DISTINCT toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time) FROM events GROUP BY toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time);
SELECT SUM(toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time)) OVER (PARTITION BY toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time)) FROM events;
